title: pseudoconyza viscosa var. lyrata
intro: Pseudoconyza viscosa var. lyrata, also known as sticky fleabane, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Pseudoconyza viscosa var. lyrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
